===Glyph origin===
{{Han etym}}
{{Han compound|㹜|t1=two dogs|言|t2=words|ls=ic}} (㹜 = [[犭]] + [[犬]], two forms of “dog”). A place where dogs are barking (言) at each other, a jail with guard dogs.

===Definitions===
{{head|zh|hanzi}}

# [[prison]]
#* {{zh-x|如 有 犯法，則 司 獄 在。|If there are those who break the law, then there are officers and '''jails''' to deal with them.|ref=Fayan-B}}
# [[lawsuit]]; [[case]]
#* {{zh-x|小 大 之 獄，雖 不能 察，必 以 情。|Though unable personally to attend to the details of all '''trials''', big and small, I always demand the facts.|ref=Zuozhuan}}
